'''nakotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seabird|seabird]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-k-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seabird|seabird]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nakotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næketheth|næketheth]] || [[word:nækethej|nækethej]] || [[word:nækethesh|nækethesh]] || [[word:nækethe|nækethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nakokothoth|nakokothoth]] || [[word:nakokothoj|nakokothoj]] || [[word:nakokothosh|nakokothosh]] || [[word:nakokotho|nakokotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nakothoth|nakothoth]] || [[word:nakothoj|nakothoj]] || [[word:nakothosh|nakothosh]] || [[word:nakotho|nakotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nakofthoth|nakofthoth]] || [[word:nakofthoj|nakofthoj]] || [[word:nakofthosh|nakofthosh]] || [[word:nakofthof|nakofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nakothotho|nakothotho]] || [[word:nakothojo|nakothojo]] || [[word:nakothosho|nakothosho]] || [[word:nakothoko|nakothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nakothoth|nakothoth]] || [[word:nakothoj|nakothoj]] || [[word:nakothosh|nakothosh]] || [[word:nakotho|nakotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nakothothol|nakothothol]] || [[word:nakothojol|nakothojol]] || [[word:nakothoshol|nakothoshol]] || [[word:nakothokol|nakothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nakothothotho|nakothothotho]] || [[word:nakothojojo|nakothojojo]] || [[word:nakothoshosho|nakothoshosho]] || [[word:nakothoko|nakothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nakothothon|nakothothon]] || [[word:nakothojon|nakothojon]] || [[word:nakothoshon|nakothoshon]] || [[word:nakothokon|nakothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nakothothoro|nakothothoro]] || [[word:nakothojoro|nakothojoro]] || [[word:nakothoshoro|nakothoshoro]] || [[word:nakothokoro|nakothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
